Coupa Turns 20!
It has been 20 years since Coupa first thought of some cool stuff
Read More
$10 Trillion and Counting...
Our unique data takes our AI capabilities to the next level
Explore Coupa AI
Coupa
Event
Join Us in Las Vegas: Where the World’s Leading Spend Network Meets. Four days. 100+ innovators. Infinite ROI.
Act Fast, Save $300
One unified AI platform for finance, procurement, and supply chain
Harness $10 trillion in spend intelligence to focus on what matters most to your business.
Learn More
Watch Now
Discover Coupa's Business Trade Network
Find out how intelligence elevates every single transaction for buyers and suppliers alike.
Learn More
Buyers
Level up visibility into your spend. See what’s changing across categories and suppliers, benchmark performance against your peers, and surface risk before it becomes a problem.
Learn More
Suppliers
Get in front of more customers. See what’s in demand on the network and align your offerings to maximize sales. Get paid faster all while offering a seamless experience that drives repeat business.
Learn More
COUPA FOR PROCUREMENT
Advance autonomous procurement
Get ahead of the competition. Work side by side with AI agents to simplify intake, source smarter, and manage direct spend with precision.
25%
acceleration in approval cycles
E-Book
Procurement Maturity Model: An AI-Powered Growth Roadmap
Blog
How To Build a Winning Category Strategy
E-Book
A Whole New Toolkit: Scaling Up Procurement with AI
COUPA FOR FINANCE
Keep spend in sight and under control
Unify purchasing, AP, and digital payments with automated controls and AI-driven insights. Protect margins and confidently take decisive actions.
40%
faster decisions with AI insights
White Paper
The Strategic CFO Report 2026: 85% of CFOs Say AI Is Central to Their Strategy. 92% Worry They Can't Pull It Off.
Blog
15 Procurement Cost Saving Strategies for Stronger Margins
White Paper
Smart Spending: How AI Is Transforming Financial Decision Making
COUPA FOR SUPPLY CHAIN
Nonstop supply chain optimization
Build a robust supply chain model and put it to the test. Explore scenarios and optimize with powerful machine learning and GenAI tools.
Up to
6%
reduction in supply chain costs
White Paper
Design Over Hype: Building the Agentic AI Supply Chain
E-Book
7 Ways to Increase Supply Chain Sustainability
Demo
Coupa Tariff Impact Planning Demo
COUPA AI
Scale AI across your processes
Apply and multiply AI advantages for measurable performance gains. Generate returns, efficiencies, and game-changing insights.
70%
reduced analysis cycle times
Blog
Coupa To Acquire Scoutbee: AI To Connect Buyers and Suppliers
E-Book
Coupa AI: What an AI-Native Platform Can Do For You
Coupa acquires Rossum
Accelerating Autonomous Spend Management
Learn More
AI Is Every CFO's Top Priority. Execution Is the Problem.
New research from 600 global finance leaders exposes the data, infrastructure, and execution gaps holding back AI transformation and what it takes to close them.
Get the 2026 Strategic CFO Report
Transform procurement intake into strategic orchestration
Read the White Paper
Coupa a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Source-to-Pay Suites
Download the full report to see why Gartner recognized Coupa as a Leader for three years running.
Get Gartner® Insights
Grow and Scale with AI procurement
Measure your maturity to find gaps and get a custom roadmap.
Take the Assessment
Scoutbee is now a Coupa company, connecting buyers and suppliers on the AI platform for total spend management
Scoutbee’s solution for supplier discovery and intake adds increased capabilities to the leading AI platform for total spend management.
Learn More
Build an intelligent supply network
Get the roadmap to advance your maturity and drive resilience and growth.
Download the E-Book
Experience a live demo
Check out our upcoming live demos to see Coupa AI and our P2P capabilities in action.
Register Now
55% of the Fortune 500 work with Coupa

hits.title: Retail giant Coupang suffers data breach impacting 33.7M people
Coupa Cafe: Where Startups Meet, Work And Test Products - Forbes
The Coupang data breach that hit two-thirds of South Korea
Nutanix, Okta, Twilio and Coupa Ready 2016 IPOs
Coupang, South Korea's Amazon, Is Copying Its Worst Habits

analysis.name: Coupa
analysis.value_proposition: A unified AI-native platform for total spend management covering source-to-contract, procure-to-order, invoice-to-pay, and direct spend across enterprise supply chains.
analysis.ideal_customer: Large enterprises and mid-market companies managing complex procurement, supply chain, AP, and finance operations across global teams

features.name: category strategy
features.description: Scale procurement planning across teams with structured category management
features.evidence_quote: Category Strategy – Scale planning across teams

features.name: sourcing
features.description: Strategic sourcing tools to accelerate and de-risk supplier selection decisions
features.evidence_quote: Sourcing – Get confident decisions faster

features.name: sourcing optimization
features.description: Advanced optimization engine to maximize sourcing efficiency across complex bid scenarios
features.evidence_quote: Sourcing Optimization – Unlock maximum efficiency

features.name: contract lifecycle management
features.description: End-to-end contract authoring, negotiation, execution, and compliance tracking
features.evidence_quote: Contract Lifecycle Management – Take control end-to-end

features.name: supplier information & risk management
features.description: Centralized supplier onboarding, data management, and risk monitoring across the supply base
features.evidence_quote: Supplier Information & Risk Management – Manage risk across suppliers

features.name: intake & orchestration
features.description: Agentic request intake layer that routes and orchestrates procurement workflows from initial request to action
features.evidence_quote: Intake & Orchestration – Turn requests into action

features.name: agentic intake & orchestration
features.description: AI-driven intake and orchestration capabilities acquired via Tonkean, enabling no-code workflow automation
features.evidence_quote: Coupa Acquires Tonkean – Agentic Intake & Orchestration

features.name: procurement
features.description: Guided buying experience with policy compliance, catalog management, and purchase order automation
features.evidence_quote: Procurement – Buy smarter, spend better

features.name: services procurement
features.description: Visibility and control over contingent workforce and services spend
features.evidence_quote: Services Procurement – Gain visibility and control

features.name: inventory management
features.description: Stock tracking and management to maintain optimal inventory levels
features.evidence_quote: Inventory Management – Manage stock with precision

features.name: spend analysis
features.description: AI-powered spend analytics providing actionable insights across categories, suppliers, and business units
features.evidence_quote: Spend Analysis – Get insights you can act on

features.name: ap automation
features.description: Accounts payable automation covering invoice capture, matching, approval, and payment processing
features.evidence_quote: AP Automation – Optimize processes with full visibility

features.name: expense management
features.description: Automated employee expense capture, policy enforcement, and reimbursement workflows
features.evidence_quote: Expense Management – Automate expense workflows

features.name: payments
features.description: Secure, streamlined B2B payment execution and tracking
features.evidence_quote: Payments – Streamline, secure, and track

features.name: treasury management
features.description: Liquidity optimization and cash management tools for finance teams
features.evidence_quote: Treasury Management – Optimize liquidity

features.name: fraud protection
features.description: Real-time fraud detection and prevention across payment and procurement workflows
features.evidence_quote: Fraud Protection – Detect and prevent

features.name: direct spend solutions
features.description: End-to-end management of direct material spend to drive cost and outcome control
features.evidence_quote: Direct Spend Solutions – Control spend to drive outcomes

features.name: supply chain design & planning
features.description: Agentic AI-powered supply chain network design and demand/disruption planning
features.evidence_quote: Supply Chain Design & Planning – Plan for demand and disruption

features.name: supply chain collaboration
features.description: Cross-team and cross-supplier alignment tools for supply chain execution
features.evidence_quote: Supply Chain Collaboration – Improve alignment across teams

features.name: coupa ai
features.description: Native AI layer powering analytics, recommendations, and agents across the full platform
features.evidence_quote: Coupa AI Overview – Real AI for real business outcomes

features.name: analytics agent
features.description: AI agent that answers analytical questions using conversational natural-language querying
features.evidence_quote: Analytics Agent – Learn how to find answers to your analytical questions

features.name: knowledge agent
features.description: AI agent providing answers to procurement-related questions from internal knowledge
features.evidence_quote: Knowledge Agent – find answers to your procurement-related questions

features.name: supplier assistance agent
features.description: Coupa Navi AI agent helping suppliers navigate the Coupa Supplier Portal via natural language
features.evidence_quote: Coupa Navi™ CSP Supplier Assistance Agent assists suppliers with general questions about the CSP

features.name: coupa compose
features.description: Unified AI intelligence layer consolidating AI capabilities across the Coupa platform
features.evidence_quote: Coupa Compose – Intelligence on one platform

features.name: ai use case library
features.description: Curated library of validated AI use cases showing measurable business results
features.evidence_quote: AI Use Case Library – See how AI drives results

features.name: coupa supplier portal (csp)
features.description: Self-service portal for suppliers to manage profiles, invoices, and communications
features.evidence_quote: Supplier Support … Supplier Verification

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Third-party app ecosystem for extending Coupa with partner-built integrations and solutions
features.evidence_quote: Integrations & App Marketplace

features.name: coupa university
features.description: Customer training and certification platform for Coupa product education
features.evidence_quote: Coupa University

features.name: community forum
features.description: Peer community for Coupa users to share best practices and get help
features.evidence_quote: Community Forum

features.name: value services
features.description: Professional services offering focused on quantifying and realizing ROI from Coupa
features.evidence_quote: Value Services

features.name: multi-language support
features.description: Platform available in English, French, German, Portuguese, Spanish, Italian, and Japanese
features.evidence_quote: English, Français, Deutsch, Português, Español, Italiano, 日本語

features.name: partner program
features.description: Structured partner ecosystem including reseller, implementation, app marketplace, and payment programs
features.evidence_quote: Partner Xchange Program … Reseller Program … App Marketplace Program … Payment Program

differentiators: $10 trillion in transactional data powering AI capabilities
Full source-to-pay coverage on a single platform
Agentic AI across procurement, finance, and supply chain
Coupa Navi supplier AI agent for self-service support
Coupa Compose as unified intelligence layer across all modules
20 years of spend management domain depth

recent_ships.what: Acquired Tonkean to add agentic intake & orchestration capabilities
recent_ships.source: Coupa Acquires Tonkean – Agentic Intake & Orchestration (landing page banner)

pricing.notes: Pricing page returned 404; Coupa is enterprise contact-sales only with no publicly listed tiers or self-serve option. Coupa Supplier Portal (CSP) access for suppliers appears to be free as part of the buyer's contract.
